overview.short: Gambhirgad Fort is a fort located 58 km from Dahanu, Palghar district, of Maharashtra.
overview.description: Gambhirgad Fort is a fort located 58 km from Dahanu, Palghar district, of Maharashtra. This fort is less important fort in Palghar district. The fort is in ruins and restoration is to be done.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gambhirgad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gambhirgad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (109 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (83 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gambhirgad?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gambhirgad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gambhirgad?
faq.a: Stays in Gambhirgad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gambhirgad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Patilpada, Dahanu (census code 551628), Vyahali, Raipur, Dahanu, Dabhadi, Dahanu, Rampur, Dahanu (census code 551636).
